ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was created */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the tweet on Twitter */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the tweet */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets of the tweet */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites (likes) of the tweet */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the tweet was posted */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment analysis score for the tweet */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of any media attached to the tweet */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been quoted */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographical location (latitude, longitude) if available */,
  "context_annotations" TEXT /* Context annotations provided by Twitter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "fullname" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio or description of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the user */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "tweets_count" INTEGER /* Total number of tweets posted by the user */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified on Twitter */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last active */,
  "protected" INTEGER /* Whether the user's tweets are protected */,
  "listed_count" INTEGER /* Number of lists the user is a member of */,
  "business_category" TEXT /* Business category of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement record */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the tweet on the given date */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets of the tweet on the given date */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites (likes) of the tweet on the given date */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of quotes for the tweet on the given date */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment analysis score for the tweet on the given date */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Overall engagement rate (calculated as a percentage of total interactions over the number of followers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)
